titles.en: Reward of performing ablution before going to bed
Reward of performing ablution before going to bed

segments: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ السِّنْدِیِّ بْنِ رَبْعَهَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ کُرْدُوسٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ تَطَهَّرَ ثُمَّ آوَی إِلَی فِرَاشِهِ بَاتَ وَ فِرَاشُهُ کَمَسْجِدِهِ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ السِّنْدِیِّ بْنِ رَبْعَهَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ کُرْدُوسٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ تَطَهَّرَ ثُمَّ آوَی إِلَی فِرَاشِهِ بَاتَ وَ فِرَاشُهُ کَمَسْجِدِهِ.

segments: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from al-Sindi b. Rab’a from Muhammad b. Kurdoos from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who goes to bed after performing ablution, his bed is like the place of worship in a mosque the whole night.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from al-Sindi b. Rab’a from Muhammad b. Kurdoos from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who goes to bed after performing ablution, his bed is like the place of worship in a mosque the whole night.”
